issues.title: Bug report - Strange readings from the soil sensors
issues.author: haadeess
issues.bodyPreview: Hi Dylan, All my soil sensors are showing almost the same high readings, followed by hours of very low readings, which can't be right. Is this due to the software updates, or what could be causing it? Let me know if I can help in any way 👍

issues.title: 361 Still loading endlessly
issues.author: haadeess
issues.bodyPreview:
> Hi @haadeess,
> 
> We have resolved the startup `ReferenceError` crash caused by the legacy dynamic `try/catch` require of `DataRecoveryManager` in `BaseUnifiedDevice`. This startup crash was preventing the app's backend from initializing properly, resulting in the debugging/configuration option l

### Auto-resolved by Diagnostic Resolver

All fingerprints in this issue found in **Tuya Unified Zigbee v8.1.115**:

**Install:** https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/test/
